# Support

Thank you for using VoxTics! Here's how to get help.

## Documentation

Start with our comprehensive documentation:
- **[Setup Guide](../docs/SETUP.md)** - Installation and configuration
- **[Architecture](../docs/ARCHITECTURE.md)** - System design overview
- **[CSS Architecture](../docs/CSS.md)** - Design system and components
- **[JavaScript Architecture](../docs/JAVASCRIPT.md)** - Frontend modules
- **[Implementation Status](../docs/STATUS.md)** - Feature completion tracking
- **[Changelog](../docs/CHANGELOG.md)** - Recent updates

## Getting Help

### 1. Search Existing Resources
- Check [GitHub Issues](https://github.com/VoxTics/VoxTics/issues) for similar problems
- Review [GitHub Discussions](https://github.com/VoxTics/VoxTics/discussions) for Q&A
- Look through documentation in `/docs` folder

### 2. Ask a Question
- Use [GitHub Discussions](https://github.com/VoxTics/VoxTics/discussions) for general questions
- Tag your question appropriately (e.g., `setup`, `configuration`, `development`)
- Include relevant details:
  - Your environment (.NET version, OS, etc.)
  - What you're trying to do
  - What you've already tried
  - Error messages or logs

### 3. Report a Bug
- Open a [GitHub Issue](https://github.com/VoxTics/VoxTics/issues/new)
- Use the bug report template
- Include:
  - Clear description of the issue
  - Steps to reproduce
  - Expected vs actual behavior
  - Environment details
  - Screenshots/logs if applicable

### 4. Request a Feature
- Use [GitHub Discussions](https://github.com/VoxTics/VoxTics/discussions) with the `feature-request` tag
- Describe the use case and benefits
- Provide examples if possible

## Community

- **GitHub Issues**: Bug reports and feature tracking
- **GitHub Discussions**: Questions, ideas, and general discussion
- **Pull Requests**: Code contributions

## Response Times

We aim to respond to issues and discussions within:
- **Critical bugs**: 24 hours
- **Regular issues**: 3-5 business days
- **Discussions**: 5-7 business days

## Security Issues

**Do not** open a public issue for security vulnerabilities. Please see [SECURITY.md](SECURITY.md) for responsible disclosure.

## Contributing

Interested in contributing? See [CONTRIBUTING.md](CONTRIBUTING.md) for guidelines.

## Additional Resources

- **Official Documentation**: See `/docs` folder
- **Code Examples**: Check the repository for sample implementations
- **Issue Templates**: Use provided templates when reporting issues

## Still Need Help?

If you can't find what you're looking for:
1. Check the documentation again
2. Search existing issues and discussions
3. Open a new discussion with your question
4. Include as much context as possible

We're here to help! 🎬
